title: date_part function return wrong result for infinite or -infinite timestamp
description:
### What happens?

When extracting the year from an 'infinity' timestamp, DuckDB returns NULL instead of the expected infinity integer value.


### To Reproduce

```
D SELECT date_part('year','infinity'::TIMESTAMP);
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ date_part('year', CAST('infinity' AS TIMESTAMP)) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                      int64                       в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                       NULL                       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

```



### OS:

Mac OS

### DuckDB Version:

1.4.0 (Andium)

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Zhibai Song

### Affiliation:

AWS

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date TIMESTAMP, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP 'infinity', 'Event with infinite date');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2025-10-02 00:00:00', 'Regular event date');
SELECT CASE WHEN event_date = TIMESTAMP 'infinity' THEN 'infinity' ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date)::VARCHAR END AS year FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date) AS year FROM test_dates WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: date_part function with 'infinity' timestamp returns NULL
